info.name: Nexus 2.0 API
info.description: Comprehensive API collection for the Nexus 2.0 Enterprise Agile Platform covering all 5 microservices: SecurityService, ProfileService, WorkService, UtilityService, and BillingService.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: login, logout, token refresh, OTP

request.description: Authenticate a user with email and password. Returns JWT access token, refresh token, and expiry.
Rotate the refresh token and obtain a new access token.
Logout the current session. Blacklists the current JWT and removes the session from Redis.
Request a 6-digit OTP for the given identity (email). OTP is valid for 5 minutes.
Verify a 6-digit OTP code for the given identity.

item.name: Password
item.description: Password management: change, reset request, reset confirm

request.description: Change the current user's password. Required for first-time users. Password must meet complexity requirements: 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character.
Request a password reset OTP for the given email address.
Confirm a password reset using the OTP code and set a new password.

item.name: Sessions
item.description: Session management: list, revoke single, revoke all

request.description: List all active sessions for the current user.
Revoke a specific session by session ID.
Revoke all sessions except the current one.

item.name: ProfileService
item.description: Identity, organization, and profile management microservice (port 5002)

item.name: Organizations
item.description: Organization CRUD, settings, status, and admin provisioning

request.description: Create a new organization. Seeds 5 default departments.
List all organizations (PlatformAdmin only).
Get organization details by ID.
Update organization details. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Update organization status (activate/suspend/deactivate). Requires OrgAdmin role.
Update organization settings including sprint duration, story point scale, default board view, and auto-assignment strategy. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Provision an OrgAdmin for an organization. Creates the team member, assigns OrgAdmin role, generates credentials via SecurityService. Requires PlatformAdmin role.

item.name: Team Members
item.description: Team member profile management, department membership, roles, and availability

request.description: List team members in the current organization. Supports filtering by departmentId, role, status, and availability.
Search team members by name, email, or professional ID.
Get detailed team member profile including departments, roles, professional ID, and availability status.
Update a team member's profile information.
Update a team member's status (activate/suspend/deactivate). Requires OrgAdmin role.
Update a team member's availability status.
Add a team member to a department. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Remove a team member from a department. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Change a team member's role within a department. Requires OrgAdmin role.

item.name: Departments
item.description: Department CRUD, status, members, and preferences

request.description: Create a new department in the current organization. Department code must be unique. Requires OrgAdmin role.
List all departments in the current organization.
Get department details by ID.
Update a department. Requires DeptLead role.
Update department status. Requires OrgAdmin role.
List members of a specific department.
Get department-level preferences.
Update department-level preferences. Requires DeptLead role.

item.name: Invites
item.description: Invitation system for onboarding new team members

request.description: Create a new invitation. Generates a cryptographic token with 48-hour expiry. Requires DeptLead role.
List pending invitations for the current organization.
Validate an invite token. No authentication required.
Accept an invitation and create the team member account. No authentication required.
Cancel a pending invitation. Requires DeptLead role.
List all available roles in the platform.
Get role details by ID.
List all registered devices for the current user. Maximum 5 devices per user.
Set a device as the primary device.
Remove a registered device.
Get the current user's preferences (theme, date format, time format, digest frequency, etc.).
Update the current user's preferences.
Get the resolved preferences for the current user (merged from user, department, and org levels).
Get notification settings for the current user across all notification types and channels (Email, Push, InApp).
Update notification setting for a specific notification type.
List all available notification types.
Get the navigation menu structure for the current user based on their role and permissions.
Get all navigation items (PlatformAdmin only).
Create a new navigation item. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Update a navigation item. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Delete a navigation item. Requires PlatformAdmin role.

item.name: Projects
item.description: Project CRUD, status management, cost summary, utilization, and export

request.description: Create a new project with a unique project key (2-10 uppercase alphanumeric). Requires DeptLead role.
List all projects in the current organization.
Get project details by ID including story count and sprint count.
Update a project. Project key is immutable. Requires DeptLead role.
Update a project's status. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Get cost summary for a project including total cost, billable vs non-billable breakdown.
Get resource utilization data for a project.
Get historical cost snapshots for a project.
Export stories as CSV file.
Export time entries as CSV file.

item.name: Stories
item.description: Story CRUD, status transitions, assignment, links, labels, comments, activity, and bulk operations

body.raw:
{
    "projectId": "{{project_id}}",
    "title": "User login flow",
    "description": "Implement the user login flow with email and password",
    "acceptanceCriteria": "User can log in with valid credentials",
    "storyPoints": 5,
    "priority": "High",
    "storyType": "Feature"
}

request.description: Create a new story in a project. Automatically generates a professional story ID (e.g., MOB-42). Story starts in Backlog status.
List stories in the current organization with optional filters.
Get story details by ID including tasks, labels, links, assignee, and activity log.
Get story details by story key (e.g., MOB-42).
Update a story.
Delete a story. Requires DeptLead role.
Transition a story's status. Valid transitions follow the workflow state machine: Backlog → Ready → InProgress → InReview → QA → Done → Closed.
Assign a story to a team member. Requires DeptLead role.
Unassign a story. Requires DeptLead role.
Create a link between two stories.
Delete a story link.
Apply a label to a story (max 10 labels per story).
Remove a label from a story.
List comments on a story.
List activity log for a story.
Organization-wide activity feed.
Bulk update story statuses. Requires DeptLead role.
Bulk assign stories. Requires DeptLead role.
List all tasks for a specific story.

item.name: Tasks
item.description: Task CRUD, status transitions, assignment, hours logging, comments, and activity

body.raw:
{
    "storyId": "{{story_id}}",
    "title": "Implement login API",
    "description": "Build the REST API for user login",
    "taskType": "Development",
    "priority": "High",
    "estimatedHours": 4
}

request.description: Create a new task. Task type determines department auto-routing. Task starts in ToDo status.
Get task details by ID.
Update a task.
Delete a task. Requires DeptLead role.
Transition a task's status.
Assign a task to a team member. Requires DeptLead role.
Self-assign a task to the current user.
Unassign a task. Requires DeptLead role.
Log hours worked on a task.
List activity log for a task.
List comments on a task.
Suggest an assignee for a task based on task type and workload.
Create a new sprint for a project. Sprint starts in Planning status. Requires DeptLead role.
List sprints in the current organization.
Get sprint details by ID.
Update a sprint (name, goal, dates). Requires DeptLead role.
Start a sprint (transition from Planning to Active). Requires DeptLead role.
Complete a sprint. Calculates velocity, moves incomplete stories back to Backlog. Requires DeptLead role.
Cancel a sprint. Requires DeptLead role.
Add a story to a sprint. Requires DeptLead role.
Remove a story from a sprint. Requires DeptLead role.
Get sprint metrics (burndown, completion rate, story points).
Get enriched sprint velocity with time tracking data.
Get velocity history for the last N completed sprints.
Get the currently active sprint.
Create a new label. Requires DeptLead role.
List all labels in the current organization.
Update a label. Requires DeptLead role.
Delete a label. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Create a comment on a story or task. Supports @mentions which trigger notifications.
Update a comment. Only the author can update.
Delete a comment. Author or DeptLead+ can delete.
Get the Kanban board view with stories grouped by status columns.
Get the Sprint board view showing the active sprint's stories and progress.
Get the Backlog board view.
Get the Department board view.

item.name: Search
item.description: Full-text search across stories and tasks

request.description: Full-text search across stories and tasks using PostgreSQL tsvector/tsquery. Minimum 2 characters required.
Create a saved filter preset.
List saved filters for the current user.
Delete a saved filter.

item.name: Story Templates
item.description: Reusable story templates for pre-filling story creation forms

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Bug Report Template",
    "description": "Template for bug reports",
    "defaultTitle": "Bug: ",
    "defaultDescription": "Steps to reproduce:\n1.\n2.\n3.",
    "defaultAcceptanceCriteria": "Bug is fixed and verified",
    "defaultPriority": "High",
    "defaultStoryType": "Bug",
    "defaultStoryPoints": 3,
    "defaultLabels": [
        "bug"
    ],
    "defaultTaskTypes": [
        "Development",
        "Testing"
    ]
}

request.description: Create a new story template.
List story templates for the current organization.
Get a story template by ID.
Update an existing story template.
Delete a story template (soft delete).
Get the workflow definitions for the current organization (default + overrides).
Save organization-level workflow override. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Save department-level workflow override. Requires DeptLead role.
Get velocity chart data for the last N completed sprints.
Get department workload report.
Get capacity utilization report.
Get cycle time report.
Get task completion report.

item.name: WorkService - Time Tracking
item.description: Time tracking, timer, cost rates, and time policy endpoints (port 5003)

item.name: Time Entries
item.description: Manual time logging and approval workflows

request.description: Create a manual time entry for a story.
List and filter time entries.
Update an existing time entry. Only the owner can update pending entries.
Soft-delete a time entry. Only the owner can delete pending entries.
Approve a pending time entry. Requires DeptLead role.
Reject a pending time entry with a reason. Requires DeptLead role.
Start a timer for a story. Only one active timer per user.
Stop the active timer and create a time entry from the elapsed duration.
Get the current user's active timer status.

item.name: Cost Rates
item.description: Hourly rate definitions at member, role, department, and org-default levels

request.description: Create a cost rate. Supports Member, Role, Department, and OrgDefault rate types. Requires OrgAdmin role.
List cost rates with optional filters.
Update a cost rate's hourly rate and effective date. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Delete a cost rate. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Get the organization's time tracking policy.
Create or update the organization's time tracking policy. Requires OrgAdmin role.

item.name: WorkService - Analytics
item.description: Analytics, reporting, risk register, and dashboard endpoints (port 5003)

item.name: Analytics
item.description: Velocity, resources, cost, health, dependencies, bugs, and dashboard

request.description: Get velocity trends for a project across recent sprints.
Get resource management data including workload distribution and capacity.
Get resource utilization metrics for a project.
Get project cost analytics including total cost, cost by member, and cost trends.
Get project health scoring with optional historical data.
Get dependency analysis for a project including cycle detection and critical path.
Get bug metrics including open/closed counts, severity distribution, and trends.
Get the analytics dashboard summary for a project.
Get the status of analytics snapshot background jobs. Requires DeptLead role.

body.raw:
{
    "projectId": "{{project_id}}",
    "sprintId": "{{sprint_id}}",
    "title": "API integration delay",
    "description": "Third-party API may not be ready on time",
    "severity": "High",
    "likelihood": "Medium",
    "mitigationStatus": "Open"
}

request.description: Create a risk register entry. Requires DeptLead role.
List risk register entries with optional filters.
Update a risk register entry. Requires DeptLead role.
Soft-delete a risk register entry. Requires DeptLead role.
Query audit logs for the current organization. Supports filtering by serviceName, action, entityType, userId, dateFrom, and dateTo. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Query archived audit logs for the current organization. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Query error logs for the current organization. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Get notification history for the current user. Supports filtering by notificationType, channel, status, dateFrom, and dateTo.

item.name: Reference Data
item.description: Platform reference data (department types, priorities, task types, workflow states)

request.description: Get all department types. No authentication required. Cached in Redis with 24-hour TTL.
Get all priority levels. No authentication required.
Get all task type references. No authentication required.
Get all workflow states for stories and tasks. No authentication required.
Create a new department type. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Create a new priority level. Requires OrgAdmin role.
List all registered error codes in the platform. Cached in Redis with 24-hour TTL.
Create a new error code. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Update an error code. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Delete an error code. Requires PlatformAdmin role.

item.name: BillingService
item.description: Subscription management, plan tiers, feature gating, and usage tracking (port 5300)

request.description: List all active subscription plans (Free, Starter, Professional, Enterprise) with pricing, feature limits, and tier levels.
Get the current organization's subscription details including plan info, usage metrics, and billing period. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Create a new subscription for the organization. Paid plans start with a 14-day trial. Free plan activates immediately. One subscription per organization. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Upgrade to a higher-tier plan. Prorated charges apply immediately. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Schedule a downgrade to a lower-tier plan at the end of the current billing period. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Cancel the current subscription. Effective at the end of the current billing period. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Get the current organization's usage metrics (active_members, stories_created, storage_bytes) with current values, limits, and percentage utilization. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Handle incoming Stripe webhook events. No authentication required (uses Stripe signature verification).
List all plans including inactive ones. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Create a new subscription plan. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Update an existing plan. PlanCode cannot be changed. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Deactivate a plan. Existing subscriptions are not affected. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
List all subscriptions across organizations. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Get detailed billing information for a specific organization. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Override an organization's subscription to a different plan. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Immediately cancel an organization's subscription. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Get platform-wide usage summary across all organizations. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
Get per-organization usage with optional threshold filter. Requires PlatformAdmin role.
